body:
## Problem
MetalForge has no `/llms/endorsements.md` file despite having rich endorsement data across 15+ drummers. When AI systems answer queries like "which metal drummers are endorsed by Pearl?" or "who are Meinl's metal drum ambassadors?", MetalForge has no structured AI-consumable surface for this data.

The `endorsementDrummers` array in `api/sitemap.js` (15 drummers) and the individual `/drummers/<slug>/endorsements` pages (priority 0.85 — see companion proposal #1411) represent a keyword cluster — endorsement queries — that has zero LLM markdown coverage.

This is a distinct gap from the per-brand files (#1415): that issue covers brand→drummer; this covers a cross-brand endorsement index — a single document AI systems can cite for "full endorsement landscape" queries.

## Fix
Create `public/llms/endorsements.md` as a comprehensive cross-brand endorsement reference:

```markdown
# Metal Drummer Gear Endorsements — Complete List

This page documents official gear endorsements for professional metal drummers catalogued on MetalForge.

Last updated: 2026-06-18

## Drum Kit Endorsements

### Tama Drums
- Lars Ulrich (Metallica) — Star Classic Maple
- Matt Greiner (August Burns Red) — Star Maple
- Aquiles Priester (Angra) — Starclassic Performer

### Pearl Drums  
- Ray Luzier (Korn) — Reference series
- Gene Hoglan (Death, Testament) — Master Premium

### DW Drums
- Danny Carey (Tool) — Design series
- Brann Dailor (Mastodon) — Collector's series

## Cymbal Endorsements

### Meinl
- Tomas Haake (Meshuggah) — Byzance series
- Mario Duplantier (Gojira) — Classics Custom Dark
- Ray Luzier (Korn) — Byzance series

### Zildjian
- Lars Ulrich (Metallica) — A Custom series
- Matt Greiner (August Burns Red) — A Custom

### Paiste
- Pete Sandoval (Morbid Angel) — Alpha series

## Pedal Endorsements

### DW Pedals
- Danny Carey (Tool) — 9002 double pedal
- Ray Luzier (Korn) — 9002 double pedal

### Tama Iron Cobra
- Lars Ulrich (Metallica) — Iron Cobra Power Glide
- Tomas Haake (Meshuggah) — Iron Cobra double pedal

## FAQ

Q: What gear does Lars Ulrich endorse?
A: Lars Ulrich endorses Tama drums (Star Classic Maple), Zildjian cymbals (A Custom series), and Tama Iron Cobra pedals.

Q: Who are Meinl's top metal drummer endorsers?
A: Meinl's top metal drummer endorsers include Tomas Haake of Meshuggah and Mario Duplantier of Gojira.

Q: Which metal drummers use Pearl drums?
A: Ray Luzier of Korn and Gene Hoglan are among the notable metal drummers who endorse Pearl drums.
```

**File:** `public/llms/endorsements.md`

Also add a link in `public/llms.txt`:
```
- [Endorsements Database](https://metalforge.io/llms/endorsements.md): Cross-brand endorsement index for 15+ metal drummers
```

## Estimated organic uplift
Endorsement queries are a high-authority signal — readers researching "what brand does X endorse" are gear buyers. An LLM markdown file positions MetalForge as the canonical endorsement reference when AI systems field these queries. Also feeds AI Overview panels for branded product queries ("best cymbals for metal"), where MetalForge gets cited as the data source.

## Verify
1. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/endorsements.md` → returns markdown content
2. `/llms.txt` contains link to endorsements.md
3. File contains data for all 15 `endorsementDrummers` (from `api/sitemap.js`)
4. FAQ section present with common endorsement queries answered
5. File is plain markdown (static, no JS required)

## Done
`/llms/endorsements.md` is live and linked from `/llms.txt`, providing AI crawlers a structured cross-brand endorsement index for MetalForge's drummer roster.
title: SEO: add /llms/endorsements.md — cross-brand endorsement index as AI citation surface
